resources.string:
OpenLedger is a local-first finance tool for everyday budgeting and records. Your financial data stays on your device — no accounts required, no cloud dependency, no tracking.
Features: • Monthly financial reports with income/expense breakdown • Import from bank CSV — auto-categorize transactions • Multi-currency support with exchange rates • Smart budgets that learn from your spending • Transaction search with advanced filters • Financial insights and spending trends • Reconciliation workflow • Dark mode • Service worker offline support • Fully open source (AGPL-3.0)
